exercises.title: Parameter Comparison
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive comparison of ML-KEM-512, ML-KEM-768, and ML-KEM-1024.
tasks: Compare public key and ciphertext sizes
Recommend variant for: TLS, IoT, high-security
hints: Consider both size and security requirements

exercises.title: KEM Operation Flow
exercises.description: Implement a diagram showing the complete ML-KEM key exchange flow.
hints: Remember the ciphertext contains the encapsulated key

exercises.title: Size Impact Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze the impact of ML-KEM key sizes on TLS handshakes.
tasks: Calculate total TLS handshake size increase

exercises.title: Security Requirements
exercises.description: Document the security requirements for a FIPS-compliant ML-KEM implementation.
